title: Ocean freight booking + shipping docs (B/L, commercial invoice)
pain_description: Each international shipment: BL, commercial invoice, packing list, certs — each carrier has different portal; manual re-entry.
santifer_pattern: Shipment data + doc generator + carrier portal agent

title: Last-mile delivery exception handling
pain_description: Failed deliveries (wrong address, no access, refused) 10-15%; re-attempts cost; customer comms manual.
santifer_pattern: Failure signal + LLM next-best + customer outreach

title: Cold chain monitoring + compliance (pharma, food)
pain_description: Temp logs across multi-leg shipments; out-of-range flags; recall drills paper-based.
santifer_pattern: Temp feed + rule engine + incident + recall-ready audit

title: Customs broker: HS classification + entry filing
pain_description: Each SKU needs HS code; wrong code = duties + penalties; brokers manual.
santifer_pattern: Product spec + HS classifier + entry filer

title: Trade finance: letter of credit document examination
pain_description: LCs: 40+ doc types; UCP 600 compliance; one discrepancy delays payment weeks.
santifer_pattern: Doc OCR + UCP rule + LLM discrepancy detector

title: Supplier onboarding for enterprise procurement
pain_description: New supplier: tax forms + banking + insurance + sanctions + quality certs — weeks per supplier.
santifer_pattern: Portal + doc agent + rule engine + sanction/adverse media

title: Shipment track-and-trace across multi-leg journeys
pain_description: Multi-mode (ocean + rail + truck) + multi-carrier = scattered data; 'where's my container?' unanswered.
santifer_pattern: Multi-source feed + LLM status narrator + alert

title: Freight invoice audit + pay
pain_description: Carriers bill with errors 20%+; shippers audit manually; recoveries left on table.
santifer_pattern: Invoice + contract rate + LLM audit + recovery filer

title: 3PL warehouse receiving + put-away ops
pain_description: Inbound trucks + scan + put-away + quality + WMS update — labor intensive, errors cascade.
santifer_pattern: Scan + CV verify + put-away optimizer + anomaly agent

title: Dock scheduling + appointment management
pain_description: Trucks arrive unscheduled; doors full; drivers wait hours; detention charges mount.
santifer_pattern: Carrier booking + load-balancing + LLM priority

title: Inventory optimization: multi-echelon demand forecast
pain_description: Retailer POS + DC stock + vendor ETA — forecast drift; stockouts + overstock simultaneously.
santifer_pattern: Demand signals + LLM forecast + replen recommender

title: Supplier quality + nonconformance tracking
pain_description: Incoming quality issues logged in Excel; CAPAs drift; supplier improvement plans orphaned.
santifer_pattern: Defect intake + LLM RCA + CAPA tracker + supplier comms

title: Import compliance: USMCA / FTA certificate of origin
pain_description: USMCA / other FTA certs per SKU / supplier / production run; audits trigger lookbacks.
santifer_pattern: BOM + supplier data + LLM qual. + cert generator

title: Dropship vendor order fulfillment sync
pain_description: Orders split across 50+ vendor portals; status polled manually; customer gets wrong ETA.
santifer_pattern: Vendor portal agent + status tracker + customer comms

title: Pharma serialization (DSCSA) traceability
pain_description: Serial tracking + EPCIS events + trading-partner authentication — complex, penalties heavy.
santifer_pattern: EPCIS feed + trading-partner agent + audit-ready

title: Automotive OEM supplier portal compliance
pain_description: GM / Ford / Stellantis portals: ASN + EDI + quality metrics — each OEM different; penalties for miss.
santifer_pattern: OEM schema + EDI converter + metric agent

title: Supplier CSR + forced-labor due diligence (UFLPA)
pain_description: US UFLPA detains shipments if XPC region suspected; tier-N supplier mapping impossible today.
santifer_pattern: Supplier graph + news + doc agent + risk memo

title: Warehouse labor scheduling + shift fill
pain_description: No-shows daily; shift manager calls pool; gig warehouse workers need matching.
santifer_pattern: Shift gap + worker pool + voice outreach

title: Parcel rate shopping + carrier selection
pain_description: UPS / FedEx / USPS / DHL / regionals — rate comparison per package manual; brands overpay.
santifer_pattern: Order attrs + multi-carrier API + cost/service optimizer

title: Rail carload + intermodal tracking
pain_description: Rail schedules change; crew availability opaque; demurrage charges accrue without visibility.
santifer_pattern: RR API + LLM status + demurrage alert

title: Hazmat shipping documentation
pain_description: DOT / IATA / IMDG classifications; packing groups; shipping papers; fines heavy for mistakes.
santifer_pattern: Product data + classification + doc generator

title: Retail allowance / deduction recovery
persona: CPG ops at brand selling to retailers
pain_description: Walmart / Target / Kroger deduct for ASN errors + chargebacks; CPG loses 1-3% revenue to unfought deductions.
santifer_pattern: Deduction intake + root-cause + dispute filer

title: Perishable food rotation + FEFO compliance
pain_description: First-expire-first-out tracking manual; expired product hits shelf; FDA traceability (FSMA 204) new.
santifer_pattern: Lot tracker + FEFO + FSMA 204 traceability

title: Construction material lead-time + jobsite delivery
pain_description: Material delays cascade; jobsite crew waits; supplier comms fragmented.
santifer_pattern: Material BOM + supplier ETA + LLM schedule impact

title: Pallet + returnable asset tracking
pain_description: Reusable pallets / totes / kegs lost in transit; brand tries to recover but data spotty.
santifer_pattern: Tracker + chain-of-custody + recovery agent

title: OTC pharma order accuracy + recall
pain_description: Recalls require 24-hr notification to all customers who received batch; manual today.
santifer_pattern: Lot tracking + recall agent + customer outreach

title: Hospital supply OR preference cards + PPI
pain_description: Each surgeon has 'preference card' for OR; updates manual; rep-managed implants complex; costs hidden.
santifer_pattern: Case data + pref card + cost optimizer + rep comms

title: Reverse logistics: returns processing at DC
pain_description: Returned items need triage: restock / refurb / scrap; manual grading; shrinkage; vendor returns slow.
santifer_pattern: Item intake + CV grading + disposition agent

title: Carrier onboarding + qualification for brokers
pain_description: Onboarding carriers: FMCSA + insurance + W-9 + agreement; load fraud if skipped; days per carrier.
santifer_pattern: FMCSA API + doc intake + fraud signals + onboarding

title: Truckload load planning + backhauls
pain_description: Dispatching loads to drivers; backhauls to avoid empty miles; current DAT-driven manual.
santifer_pattern: Load intake + driver+HOS + LLM optimizer

title: Cross-docking scheduling + sortation
pain_description: Inbound ↔ outbound matching; time windows tight; mis-sorts cost.
santifer_pattern: Inbound + outbound + matching agent

title: Procurement category management + spend analysis
pain_description: Spend analytics + supplier rationalization + savings opportunities — manual in Excel.
santifer_pattern: Spend data + LLM insights + saving recs

title: Contract manufacturer audit coordination
pain_description: Factory audits (social, quality, security) per CM per year; reports PDF-heavy; CAPA tracking slip.
santifer_pattern: Audit report intake + finding extractor + CAPA tracker

title: OEM spare parts: catalog + ordering for legacy equipment
pain_description: Old equipment; parts cataloged in paper manuals; tech calls OEM for lookups; downtime mounts.
santifer_pattern: Equipment ID + manual RAG + part lookup + order

title: CPG new-item setup at retailer
pain_description: New item at Walmart/Target = 200+ fields; vendor portal slow; rejections cost weeks.
santifer_pattern: Product master + retailer schema + LLM mapper + submitter

title: Trade promotion planning + deduction
pain_description: Retailer promo plans + lift + deductions = spreadsheet; no clear ROI.
santifer_pattern: Plan + actuals + LLM ROI + deduction recon

title: OSHA + EHS incident reporting + root cause
pain_description: Incidents reported on paper; OSHA 300 logs; near-misses missed; RCA shallow.
santifer_pattern: Intake + photo + LLM RCA + OSHA filer

title: Forklift + asset preventive maintenance
pain_description: PM schedules drift; unplanned downtime spikes; CMMS ignored.
santifer_pattern: Asset data + IoT signals + LLM scheduler + tech mobile

title: Packaging specification management
pain_description: Hundreds of SKUs × regions × regulatory = spec sprawl; mistakes trigger product recalls.
santifer_pattern: Spec DB + regulatory rule + change impact agent

title: Food service distributor route + stop ops
pain_description: 50-100 stops/day; stop windows tight; driver-phone customer + stock comms manual.
santifer_pattern: Route + stop + voice agent + customer ETA

title: Container damage + survey at port
pain_description: Damaged container photos + surveyor reports + dispute; carrier pushback.
santifer_pattern: Photo + CV damage + LLM report + claim filer

title: Rare earth + critical mineral sourcing compliance
pain_description: Export controls + OFAC + NDAA Section 889 — supply chain must prove origin.
santifer_pattern: Supplier graph + LLM origin-tracer + compliance report

title: LTL (less-than-truckload) freight claims
pain_description: Damaged/missing LTL shipments; claims filing byzantine per carrier; most claims denied.
santifer_pattern: Claim intake + carrier portal + evidence agent

title: Cold-chain pharma last-mile hand-off
pain_description: Cold-chain biologics last-mile; GPS + temp + recipient ID + signature; any break = loss.
santifer_pattern: Multi-sensor + recipient workflow + breach handler

title: Product recall management (multi-stakeholder)
pain_description: Recall = notify retailers + consumers + FDA + media; lot trace; refunds; reputation.
santifer_pattern: Lot registry + notification orchestrator + refund workflow

title: Global trade tariff + duty calculation
pain_description: US + EU + other tariff codes change (2025 tariff churn); duty calcs per SKU per shipment manual.
santifer_pattern: HS + origin + rate engine + LLM explanation

title: Marine insurance claim adjusting
pain_description: Ocean cargo loss claims: survey + bill of lading + GA declarations; cross-border complexity.
santifer_pattern: Doc intake + extractor + LLM adjuster memo

title: Retail planogram + shelf compliance audit
pain_description: Rep visits store, checks shelf vs planogram; photo upload + score; brand side has no real-time view.
santifer_pattern: Shelf photo + CV planogram check + rep guidance

title: Restaurant supply chain + theoretical food cost
pain_description: Invoice + recipe + POS mix = theoretical vs actual food cost; variance hard to attribute.
santifer_pattern: Invoice + POS + recipe + variance explainer

title: Global sanctions screening for every shipment
pain_description: Denied party lists (SDN, EL, DPL) update constantly; every ship-to needs screening; false positives tie up.
santifer_pattern: Shipment + list + LLM match reasoner + audit
